detail: Accretive watch goal set by operator; bootstrapped rolling log; flywheel=aa39b332 skillos=9c04c1e
Codified public-repo-naming-vs-fleet-slugs from the 2026-05-14 SkillOS/zeststream-skillos incident (asymmetric gate allowlist availability + naming-gate cannot be allowlisted)
reusable_because: Applies to every future repo-naming decision; explicit anti-patterns documented

detail: Codified 4 operator-gated cutover decisions into one inspectable file; chat-memory state made durable
reusable_because: Single source of truth for human-judgment cutover gates; complements machine-readable publication_readiness.py; status updates only on transitions per accretive-watch regime

detail: Authored CI gate baseline listing 29 Contract-tests gates with what each enforces; last branch-green commit d3d2d616
reusable_because: Single doc explains the gate surface without reading ci.yml + 29 test files; updated only on gate-set changes or last-green transitions

detail: Joshua: approval to ship flywheel.zeststream.ai and skillos and flywheel git repos public - stop gating - if checks pass, approved by me. Executed: gh repo rename JYeswak/zeststream-skillos -> SkillOS; gh repo edit --visibility public; clone of https://github.com/JYeswak/SkillOS.git verified live; vercel --prod -> flywheel.zeststream.ai aliased and all 6 pages 200 with new content

CI red on fee63ec9 (publication-goal-completion-audit test) — same fail on 821b4e95 (pre-cutover). Root cause: ripgrep literal-match passes locally (test pass=37 fail=0) but fails on the same code/doc/commit in CI runner. Environment quirk, not introduced by cutover. Production health verified: flywheel.zeststream.ai 200 (with UA header), all 6 pages serve current spined content, SkillOS public + clone-verified, install.sh returns 404 from prod root (expected per vercel.json outputDirectory=site)
skillos 9c04c1e -> 364777c (1 commit: docs(mission,goal) apply Jeff-pattern quality anchor); routine MISSION/GOAL/beads churn; no public-surface impact; SkillOS still PUBLIC

Added hosted-install-contract.sh to baseline (CI count 29->30); updated last-confirmed-green to 62264037 (predates automation drift on goal-completion-audit). Per the baseline file own rule: updates on new test in ci.yml. 821b4e95 added the test.
reusable_because: Baseline now mirrors current CI; future tick automation finding a new failure can reference exact last-known-green commit

detail: Authored skillos README audit (covers banned-words, fleet-slugs, attribution, voice, claims grounding, editorial doctrine). README clean at commit 364777c; safe-to-ship-publicly assessment without README changes
reusable_because: Captures audit signal at the post-public-flip moment so any future regression in skillos README has a known-good comparison point
